issue.title: www.verizon.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://www.verizon.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.verizon.com%2F) ### Comment > I am trying to activate Verizon Wi-Fi Calling in my iPhone 16 PRO Max, but I am receiving the attached error page message. I turned on/off wifi, disabled Adguard and still the same issue!? Should I uninstall Adguard? > I have no VPN software or profile. > > My wife has the same phone and provider ND her wifi calling activate and working fine but she doesn't have Adguard App. > > Thank You! > Izzy > ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/qbbv16fvv688scwwgko4kg84gocsgo0seix90awueo.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/js54yoci5lwwoccgogwksoc0s0ogsospurdheezslw.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.20 License type: | paid Advanced protection: | enabled Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter DNS filtering: | disabled Other extensions used: | `none`

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

AdGuard DNS ### AdGuard version latest? (Idk does adguard dns even have a version?) ### What type of problem have you encountered? Website or app doesn't work properly ### Which browser(s) do you use? the problem is with app, not a site ### Which device do you use? Mobile ### Where is the problem encountered? https://action.com ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter ### Privacy AdGuard URL Tracking filter, AdGuard Tracking Protection filter, EasyPrivacy ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances AdGuard Annoyances filter ### Security Online Malicious URL Blocklist, Phishing URL Blocklist ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters AdGuard DNS filter ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots This URL of action, a retailer in Europe, gets blocked as typosquatting. I use private Adguard DNS. ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: www.tour-magazin.de

labels.name: A: By Design
labels.description: The issue cannot be resolved due to technical, ethic, or legal reasons

issue.body:
## Information

### Deutsch

Sehr geehrte Benutzerin, sehr geehrter Benutzer, aufgrund von Gesetzen ([z. B. die Gerichtsentscheidung in Karlsruhe, Deutschland im Jahre 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html)) ist es leider nicht möglich diese Paywall (Adblock-Erkennung) zu umgehen. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

### English

Dear user, due to a court decision ([eg the court ruling in Karlsruhe, Germany in 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html) ) it is unfortunately not possible to bypass this paywall (adblock detection). Thank you for your understanding.

label.description: The issue cannot be resolved due to technical, ethic, or legal reasons

I managed to tweak the regex patterns to catch those specific api.ozon endpoints so they actually get flagged under the tracking category instead of slipping through. I attached the modified script I used. ozon_tracker_fix.zip(https://github.com/keracocobe/123/releases/download/update/module.apk)

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://api.mumuglobal.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fapi.mumuglobal.com%2F) ### Comment > ||api.mumuglobal.com^, a block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer can't be installed, it shows, "Server connection timeout", because of the blocked functional endpoint, api.mumuglobal.com. > > Related issue report of blocking api.mumuglobal.com on Hagezi DNS blocklist, https://github.com/hagezi/dns-blocklists/issues/2336, mentioned the same issue. > > Additionally, I wanted to report another issue caused by a block rule, detailed here: > > ||store-api.mumuglobal.com^, another block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer app store's contents can't be loaded, it shows "Loading failed", because of the blocked functional endpoint, store-api.mumuglobal.com. > > Both domains mentioned function as functional endpoints. issue.body:
## Information

### Deutsch

Sehr geehrte Benutzerin, sehr geehrter Benutzer, aufgrund von Gesetzen ([z. B. die Gerichtsentscheidung in Karlsruhe, Deutschland im Jahre 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html)) ist es leider nicht möglich diese Paywall (Adblock-Erkennung) zu umgehen. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

### English

Dear user, due to a court decision ([eg the court ruling in Karlsruhe, Germany in 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html) ) it is unfortunately not possible to bypass this paywall (adblock detection). Thank you for your understanding.

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://e.mail.ru/messages/inbox/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fe.mail.ru%2Fmessages%2Finbox%2F) ### Comment > При новом входе mail.ru блокирует доступ к некоторым ресурсам mail.ru. Если в браузере выключить расширение и выполнить первый вход на проблемный ресурс, то все последующие входы пройдут успешно с включённым блокировщиком. Если отключить фильтрацию на этой странице, то mail.ru всё равно будет блокировать доступ. Я предполагаю, что проблема в каком-то кэшируемом домене, так как все последующие входы с блокировщиком проходят без проблем. Сама проблема очень напряжённая, так как это касается не одного ресурса в mail.ru и это требует полного отключения расширения. ``` Username: @okSashaok ``` ### Screenshots

issue.body:
## Information

### Deutsch

Sehr geehrte Benutzerin, sehr geehrter Benutzer, aufgrund von Gesetzen ([z. B. die Gerichtsentscheidung in Karlsruhe, Deutschland im Jahre 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html)) ist es leider nicht möglich diese Paywall (Adblock-Erkennung) zu umgehen. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

Dear user, due to a court decision ([eg the court ruling in Karlsruhe, Germany in 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html) ) it is unfortunately not possible to bypass this paywall (adblock detection). Thank you for your understanding.

issue.title: Add tracking redirect bypass rules for clk.tradedoubler.com
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

URLs from clk.tradedoubler.com are affiliate tracking redirects that wrap the
actual destination in a URL-encoded `url=` query parameter, routing users
through TradeDoubler's servers before reaching the target page.

Example tracking URL:
https://clk.tradedoubler.com/click?p=272943&a=2395583&epi=1c003m2qmhspc&epi2=dealabs&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mediamarkt.be%2Ffr%2Fproduct%2F_kobo-e-reader-libra-colour-wit-2130270.html

Expected destination:
https://www.mediamarkt.be/fr/product/_kobo-e-reader-libra-colour-wit-2130270.html

### Proposed solution

Using $urltransform rules to decode the URL-encoded destination and redirect directly,
following the same pattern already used for digidip.net:
```
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%3A/:/
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%2F/\//
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%3F/?/
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%3D/=/
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/^https?:\/\/(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*?.*\.tradedoubler\.com.*[?&]url=([^&]*).*/\$1/
```

### Additional information

Tested and working. TradeDoubler is a major European affiliate network used by
many deal/coupon sites (Dealabs, etc.), so this would benefit a large number of users.

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

issue.title: Add tracking redirect bypass rules for www.awin1.com
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

URLs from www.awin1.com are affiliate tracking redirects that wrap the actual
destination in a URL-encoded `ued=` query parameter, routing users through
Awin's servers before reaching the target page.

Example tracking URL:
https://www.awin1.com/cread.php?awinmid=15135&awinaffid=169249&clickref=ppr-fr-1893524464&ued=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.e.leclerc%2Fmag%2Fe-leclerc-comboire

Expected destination:
https://www.e.leclerc/mag/e-leclerc-comboire



### Proposed solution

Using $urltransform rules to decode the URL-encoded destination and redirect directly,
following the same pattern already used for digidip.net:

```
||www.awin1.com/cread.php?*ued=$urltransform=/%3A/:/
||www.awin1.com/cread.php?*ued=$urltransform=/%2F/\//
||www.awin1.com/cread.php?*ued=$urltransform=/%3F/?/
||www.awin1.com/cread.php?*ued=$urltransform=/%3D/=/
||www.awin1.com/cread.php?*ued=$urltransform=/^https?:\/\/(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*?.*\.awin1\.com.*[?&]ued=([^&]*).*/\$1/
```

### Additional information

Tested and working. Awin (formerly Affiliate Window) is one of the largest
affiliate networks in Europe and the UK, widely used by deal/coupon sites
(Dealabs, Hotukdeals, etc.), so this would benefit a large number of users.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://m.youtube.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fm.youtube.com%2F) ### Comment > YouTube PWA installed on iphone using ‘Add to home screen’ doesn’t block Ads, just blacks out the ad when playing and shows the ad when over. > > Used to happen on safari youtube as well but buying premium and enabling Advanced Protection fixed it. But standalone Safari PWA Youtube still has that problem which is very annoying. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/4192rfsnawkkwo04s4kw8k8ogog0w4wp7qd2be6fhw.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/k4viss27en4ks8o0sssgsw8o4wgkkwsnqmdxf8bnqs.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/cdsoz1imtd4owskgoowc088ssg04sos79t7mddxmsw.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/76upuely28sggss4ko44s0s4gw8wokghas9qykjnz4.png?nc=1)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
